title: 目標達成の後に・落星

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Phew... I did it, Trainer. With your help, I've made
it through the Classics season.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After the Kikuka Sho passes, I continue
supporting Meisho Doto in all her endeavors.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I could only come this far thanks to you, Trainer...
Along with Opera O and Ayabe.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I don't have half of the passion those two have
but... maybe it's time...
choice_data_list: To aim for a bigger goal?
To aim for a bigger goal?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Huh? Oh, no, that's not what I had in mind...
choice_data_list: Then, try saying it loud and clear!
Then, try saying it loud and clear!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
No, no, no, I couldn't possibly do that! My heart
would jump out of my chest!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She still lacks the courage to make goals for
herself. More time is still needed.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wham!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Waaaagh!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The silence of my office dissolves immediately
with a loud noise. I look over to see the door
kicked wide open.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff... Doto! Trainer! Have you two heard the news?!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Ayabe... she's...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: ...Huh?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Rumble, rumble... Ssss...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: You have... inflammation in your legs.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
And... you don't know when you can get back to
racing?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Yes, that's what the doctor said.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
I noticed something was... off after the Kikuka
Sho.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: But, why? Why... you? Oh, Ayabe...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Nobody utters a word, not even T.M. Opera O.
The silence in the room is stifling.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
This is... too much. Something like this shouldn't
be allowed to happen...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Ayabe, you're so... You're so—Sniff!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: I feel... like I've been set free a little.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
I don't have to run, for now. And no running
means... I don't have to win.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
I don't have to force myself to look up at the sky
anymore.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: But... But!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Doto, you can't change what has happened. We
all need a moment of respite sometimes.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Be well, Ayabe. I am certain that for you, this is
but a small obstacle in a greater path. However...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
This means our fight with the generation
prior—the Ultimate Generation—will take a turn
for the worse.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
With our valiant trio whittled down to two, I can
only imagine my foes will have me surrounded.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
T.M. Opera O laments the approaching future,
her last words a whisper.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
But alas, this is fate. All we can do is wait, I
suppose.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
This can't be happening... Ayabe... T.M. Opera
too...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Not my... two dearest friends... Sniffle... Waaaaahh!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Waaaaahhh!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Bang! Dash!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: (Why, why, whywhywhywhy?)

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
(Why would the gods do this? To someone so
kind like Ayabe?)

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
(She's done so many things for me and Opera O.
And yet!)

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: I can't do anything! I can't give anything back! Waaaahh!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Eventually, the rain clears. I find Meisho Doto
alone, standing in a daze.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Trainer...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I may be clumsy and wimpy and dumb... But I still
tried to come up with something. I thought and
thought and thought...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
That's how I figured it out—I can't do anything for
Ayabe right now.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I'm not very smart, but that I can at least
understand. The things I believed were certain
turned out not to be.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Right now isn't good for... Ayabe... It isn't good for Ayabe or Opera O... but I can't... I can't...
choice_data_list: There has to be something you can do, right?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Huh?
choice_data_list: Surely, there's something you can do... right?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
What I suddenly say to her sounds almost like a
prayer, however...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: There's nothing I can do... for Ayabe...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
But maybe... that doesn't apply to everything
else.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Opera O could crumble under the competition. If
that happens, Ayabe will have nowhere to return.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I have to protect them. No matter what happens
or who gets in the way.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: If no one else is there to run alongside Opera O...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: I will.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Just two short words. But they mark a first for
Meisho Doto. She's finally found the fire within.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: I may be clumsy, wimpy, and dumb... But...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I know when I'm in someone's debt. I-I have to get
stronger—I just have to!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I don't have what it takes right now. My strength,
my speed, everything is lacking. That's why...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I have to work my way up, until I'm ready for a
spring G1!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We come to a conclusion after a long discussion.
Our next goal will be the G2 Nikkei Shinshun Hai.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: It's held in January, which will give us plenty of time to prep for G1s afterwards. The lineup does includes a few heavy-hitter senior runners, though...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I will compete! And I will show you my best run
yet!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The training wheels are off. It's time for Meisho
Doto to break out of her shell and grow.
